{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201718489948C6701090AF42D6CB"}"},"total":508},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7312989686494151458","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常不错的历史演义，可看得出作者深厚的历史功底。而且作者的语言优美，文风幽默又诙谐，可见作者的用心。
此外，作者还运用现代的社会结构与内容来描写历史，更加通俗易懂，并且充满了风趣，值得一读！
本人也很喜欢历史，很喜欢作者对此的描写。
中华民族的历史是我们民族的文化瑰宝，能通过作者笔下领略先辈的丰富文化底蕴，让我感到无比庆幸[学会了][学会了]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1702690542,"group_id":"7292709103887977535","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"天命wx作者：thbxl666","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5kgX5OXaEP0QkifsbBhqEITb9W+zFruxiiYU2HmmyI1","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/7046b2602ebb40c888a7bbecf2883614~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776537918&x-signature=gsRaOCc3pjkut1dhg%2Brl5YjPjqY%3D","user_id":"3609045764415214","user_name":"桃花不想来"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3609045764415214","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.1","title_id":"author_level_1"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.1","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.1"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7292709103887977535","book_info":{"abstract":"秦末，天下大乱，群雄崛起，陈胜、项梁、项羽、章邯、刘邦无数英雄大爆发、大现世。
该书战争场面恢宏磅礴，一场接一场，场场爆
雷，无尿点。英雄人物刻画栩栩如生，英雄人
物对决，精彩刺激纷呈，故事跌宕起伏、脍炙
人口，文笔诙谐幽默、古今相通、归纳点评。
读后让人酣畅淋漓、回味无穷，各类知识一下
就消化于脑，非常值得阅读的一本书。
本书忠实于正史文献，凡是历史人物正史文献记载不详或无或记载与当时情节有背于逻辑关系时，便以野史、当地传说、戏曲故事等弥补充盈，使内容逻辑更加清晰，故事跌宕起伏。
本书战争一场接一场，应接不暇，战争场面恢宏磅礴、精彩刺激。作品中英雄人物故事描写刻画详细，打斗对决精彩纷呈，个个栩栩如生。
作品语言采用新颖之法，古今相融、诙谐幽默 ，写古道今，归纳点评。使读者在工作、学习闲暇之余，能非常轻松愉悦了解记忆汉朝及此相关大量古今中外历史、文化、军事、政治、地理、文物等方面知识。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/12df5522cb0ce925e3531817a3bfa81a","author":"黔中刀客","author_id":"","book_id":"7292709103887977535","book_name":"汉朝之秦末楚汉争霸","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281810","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7292710520942461459","read_count":"945","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1072119"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.3","serial_count":"466","tags":"历史古代,历史","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/415c33c3eac65374a7409222f09bb0ba~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779182328&x-signature=S905fgxaSUMF%2BS2G603om01ctV0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"99382559778752","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"142412"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201718489948C6701090AF42D6CB"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":12,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":26724,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":26866,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":1711},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1704697691,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7365565769885811518","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，非常好看的一部历史大场面小说，大力推荐!
作者文笔犀利流畅，故事情节跌宕起伏，人物性格塑造深动，故事逻辑清晰紧密。
故事开头直接铺叙宏达的战争场面和故事简介，让人一下就知道故事的情节发展脉搏，接着笔锋一转，故事又恢复于小桥流水的故事开头描述，故事慢慢娓娓道来，给人极想跟着故事人物行走去，使得读者也进入故事中，入穿越其中，跟着行走中，荡气回肠`身临其境。
其次作者文风清新流畅幽默，读作品无枯燥乏味，能于故事人物空冥其中，时而与故事人物同欢喜，时而与故事人物同伤悲 ，时而与故事人物同命运，时而与故事人物同战斗，非常棒的一部历史宏大秦末小说。
爱上了，作者大大加油码子，更新，让读者每日能读到大大荡气回肠饕鬄精文，绝对五星好评！[赞][赞][赞][赞][赞][赞][赞]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1714933360,"group_id":"7292709103887977535","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/CkjNDOpRY5Tk4bnpgO3uw=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"79552043927","user_name":"用户名63792135"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"79552043927","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7292709103887977535","book_info":{"abstract":"秦末，天下大乱，群雄崛起，陈胜、项梁、项羽、章邯、刘邦无数英雄大爆发、大现世。
